content:
IVX DATA VAULT + ZERO DATA LOSS SYSTEM

Build IVX recovery system like enterprise platforms.

OBJECTIVE:
No member, investor, wallet, ledger, deal, message, or analytics data can be permanently lost by accident.

CREATE THESE MODULES:

1. SOFT DELETE ONLY
- Never hard delete production data.
- Add deleted_at, deleted_by, delete_reason.
- Restore button for owner.
- Hide deleted records from normal UI.

2. DATA VAULT
- Before any delete/update/truncate, copy full record to data_vault table.
- Store table_name, record_id, old_data, new_data, action, user_id, timestamp.
- Owner can restore from vault.

3. POINT-IN-TIME BACKUP CHECK
- Add admin page showing Supabase PITR status.
- Show last backup time.
- Show restore window.
- Alert if PITR is disabled.

4. SNAPSHOT SYSTEM
- Daily snapshot of critical tables:
  members
  investors
  buyers
  wallets
  ledger
  transactions
  deals
  messages
  analytics
- Store snapshot metadata and row counts.

5. IMMUTABLE LEDGER
- Ledger entries can never be deleted.
- Corrections must be new reverse/correction entries.
- Hash chain each ledger record.

6. TWO-PERSON DELETE APPROVAL
- Any destructive action requires:
  owner approval
  second approval
  reason
  typed confirmation
  audit record

7. DANGER BLOCKER
- Block DELETE, TRUNCATE, DROP on production unless SAFE_DELETE_APPROVED=true.
- Autonomous mode cannot run destructive operations.
- Any cleanup must archive, not delete.

8. RESTORE CENTER
Create Owner Admin page:
- Deleted records
- Vault records
- Snapshots
- Backup status
- Restore selected record
- Restore full table snapshot
- Export emergency backup

9. RECOVERY DRILL
Run test:
- Create test member
- Archive it
- Restore it
- Verify restored in Members UI
- Create wallet entry
- Attempt delete
- Confirm delete is blocked
- Create correction entry instead

10. REPORTING
Every day generate:
- backup status
- row counts
- deleted records
- restored records
- vault size
- last snapshot
- recovery risk

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

STATE:
FILES_CHANGED:
DATA_VAULT_STATUS:
SOFT_DELETE_STATUS:
SNAPSHOT_STATUS:
PITR_STATUS:
RESTORE_CENTER_STATUS:
DANGER_BLOCKER_STATUS:
LEDGER_IMMUTABLE_STATUS:
TWO_PERSON_APPROVAL_STATUS:
RECOVERY_DRILL_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Never hard delete investor/member/money data.
Never mark VERIFIED until restore test passes live.
